target_device.notes: Chromebook screens are small and low-res. Keep information dense but not cramped. Test at 1366x768.

mvp_loop.description: 3 consecutive mid-season weeks to prove the full gameplay loop
mvp_loop.starting_state: Week 20 of 46. Player is mid-table (8th-12th). Season in progress, squad established.
per_week_flow: 1. Command Centre: see league table, data tiles (budget, position, form, confidence), news ticker
2. Social Feed tile glows: 1-2 events to resolve (negotiation, sponsorship, crisis, etc.)
3. Open Social Feed slide-over: chat with NPC, resolve event (may include math challenge)
4. Return to Command Centre: see updated state from decisions
5. Optional: open Isometric Blueprint to upgrade a facility (math challenge for ROI)
6. Click 'Advance Week': simulation runs, match results appear, league table updates
7. News ticker updates with headlines from the week's results
what_this_proves: Command Centre as the hub works
Slide-over navigation between pillars feels natural
Math challenges are integrated into decisions, not bolted on
Domain logic (events, simulation, reducers) drives the UI correctly

isometric_slideout.priority: Nice to have for MVP (can stub with placeholder tiles)
isometric_slideout.notes: Even a simplified version with clickable building cards (not full isometric) proves the loop

out_of_scope_for_mvp: Pre-season flow (club intro, initial transfers, staff hiring)
Full isometric rendering (card-based placeholder is fine)
Budget dashboard (data tiles cover this for now)
